channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Norstat for MTÜ Ühiskonnauuringute Instituut, 6–13 July 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
4 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Norstat for MTÜ Ühiskonnauuringute Instituut, 6–13 July 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/estonian_ep_polls/2026-07-13-Norstat.html
